summary: Classified 10 open PR candidates from the hydrated preflight artifact. This inventory shard has no shared canonical; nine PRs should remain open for normal maintainer or proof follow-up, and one security-sensitive OAuth hardening PR is quarantined to central security handling. No close, merge, label, comment, fix, or PR-creation action is planned.

actions.reason: Useful contributor PR with proof, but not closable or mergeable in this inventory plan because merge/fix actions are blocked and review-bot history still needs maintainer-grade resolution.
Security-sensitive OAuth/SSRF-boundary work is out of ProjectClownfish backlog cleanup scope and must be routed to central OpenClaw security handling.
Focused, proof-supplied PR should remain open for maintainer review; this shard has no shared canonical and merge is blocked by job policy.
Narrow proof-supplied memory-core PR should stay open for maintainer review; no close or merge action is appropriate in plan mode.
Maintainer-owned draft QA work is not a cleanup target; keep open outside this inventory shard.
Valid feature PR with proof but currently dirty/unmergeable; keep open for maintainer or author follow-up.
Same root area as #90770, but useful contributor code and active author follow-up make closure unsafe without maintainer judgment or a replacement plan.
Contributor PR remains meaningful but needs author/maintainer follow-up; no close or merge action is appropriate.
Message-delivery PR has a failing proof gate; keep open for proof or author follow-up rather than closing or merging.
Focused memory-core PR remains plausible but proof is currently insufficient; keep open for proof follow-up.
